site.title: The Real GDP
site.description: Measuring real wealth beyond GDP. 5 dimensions, open data.
site.tagline: What if we measured wealth the right way?

home.hero_sub: GDP measures activity, not wealth. We measure the 5 dimensions that actually matter.
home.ranking_sub: Real GDP score: average of 5 normalized dimensions (0-100)

methodology.title: Methodology
methodology.sub: How we calculate the Real GDP score
methodology.intro: The Real GDP is the simple average of 5 normalized dimensions, each scored 0-100.
methodology.limitations_text: This is an approximation. Each dimension compresses complex realities into a single number. The weights are equal by default — a political choice. We publish the data so you can weight them yourself.

country.vs_gdp: Real GDP vs GDP per capita

footer.built: Built with open data from World Bank, UNDP, WIPO
